notes:
This printer might work, somewhat, with the various BJC drivers out there. I doubt, however, that it prints perfectly. I am almost certain that the scanner feature is unsupported. If anyone actually has one, do tell...

With the stp driver (set up for the BJC-7100 if your Gimp-Print version gives incorrect printouts), it works, although the best modes aren't yet supported. The printouts will come out too dark, so raise the gamma somewhat.

Canon reported that it probably will work with the driver for the BJC-6200 or BJC-7100. Use it 6-ink photo printing, 4-ink printing is not available for this model.

Consumables/Refills: 6 independent ink tanks

drivers.name: bj8XXYYZ.upp
drivers.comments:
This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application

This is a set of UPP files for the Canon BJC-8200 which comes with Ghostscript 6.50 or newer. It supports several modes up to the highest resolution on photo papers. Gimp-Print also supports this model, but it is not known which driver gives the better results.

The documentation to this driver (see driver's web page) tells that with this driver the maximum printout quality is reached, even it supports only 4-ink printing, but the Windows driver also uses only four inks in its highest quality modes.

UPP files of this driver: bj8gc12f.upp, bj8hg12f.upp, bj8oh06n.upp, bj8pa06n.upp, bj8pp12f.upp, bj8ts06n.upp
